title: Almond Adventurer
description: A nutty, silky, adventurous Spanish dish featuring almond extract and poaching techniques, perfect for raw-friendly dishes.
instructions: Blend almonds in a blender until finely ground.
In a large pot, heat coconut milk to simmering temperature (around 180°F).
Add almond extract and vanilla extract to the hot coconut milk. Stir well.
Slowly pour the blended almonds into the hot liquid while stirring constantly.
Simmer for about 5 minutes or until thickened slightly.
Stir in raw honey, cinnamon powder, chopped pistachios, and raisins. Mix well.
Let it cool to room temperature before serving.
Serve chilled with fresh mint leaves for garnish.
